name: Zero-Touch Intake Pipeline
notes: Import this blueprint into Make.com. You will need to click on the Typeform and Clio modules to authenticate with your own API keys. The router handles duplicate detection: if a contact already exists in Clio, it updates the existing record instead of creating a duplicate.

metadata.notes: Watches for new client intake form submissions. Connect your Typeform account and select your intake form.
Searches Clio for an existing contact matching the submitted email address. This prevents duplicate client records.
Routes to 'Create' if no match found, or 'Update' if the contact already exists.
Creates a new contact in Clio with all intake form fields mapped to the correct custom fields.
Automatically creates a new matter linked to the new contact. Set your default practice area and status.
If the contact already exists, updates their record with the new intake info instead of creating a duplicate.

setup_instructions: 1. Import this JSON into Make.com via Create Scenario > Import Blueprint.
2. Click the Typeform module and connect your Typeform account. Select your intake form.
3. Click each Clio module and authenticate with your Clio API credentials.
4. Map your Typeform question IDs to the placeholder fields (first_name, last_name, email, phone, practice_area, case_summary, how_did_you_hear).
5. Adjust the custom_fields in modules 4 and 6 to match your Clio custom field names.
6. Test with a sample submission before turning on the scenario.
7. Set the scenario schedule to 'Immediately' for real-time processing.
